ai.notes: The form uses a Lever-based application structure. Location input includes a hidden field for selection. hCaptcha is present.

fields.question: Resume/CV
Full name
Email
Phone
Current location
Current company
LinkedIn URL
Will you require work sponsorship now or in the future to legally work in Canada?
Are you able to work within the Western US/Canada Timezone?
Are you looking for a hands-on role where you write and review code regularly, not a purely architectural or advisory position?
Have you worked closely with Product Managers and Designers in an agile/iterative development process?
Are you comfortable being accountable for technical decisions, delivery timelines, and quality outcomes?
Are you comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment where priorities can shift quickly?
Have you been the primary technical owner responsible for defining and driving a major feature with a team in a production SaaS environment?
Have you implemented or significantly improved automated testing practices in a production codebase?
Have you regularly participated in support ticket triage or handled customer-facing technical issues?
Do your compensation expectations align with a $170,000 CAD target?
Do you have at least 5 years of experience in Ruby on Rails or Go?
Gender
Race
options: Black or African American (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander (Not Hispanic or Latino)
American Indian or Alaska Native (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Two or More Races (Not Hispanic or Latino)

fields.question: Veteran status
Yes, HappyCo can contact me about future job opportunities for up to 2 years
